# Plate Discipline

> Data-driven visual essays about baseball. Spin rates, swing decisions, and probability shifts, designed to be felt, not just read.

## About

Plate Discipline publishes visual essays designed to be read in the browser. Each essay combines long-form analysis with interactive data visualizations, animated charts, and typographic treatments that work as part of the reading experience. Written by Jesse Walker.

## Topics

Data-driven visual essays about baseball. Spin rates, swing decisions, and probability shifts, designed to be felt, not just read.

## Published Essays

- The Closer Is a Myth: https://plate-discipline.com/the-closer-is-a-myth
- Pitch Clock and the Rhythm of the Game: https://plate-discipline.com/pitch-clock-and-the-rhythm-of-the-game
- How Spring Training Stats Lie: https://plate-discipline.com/how-spring-training-stats-lie
- The Dead Ball Is Back: https://plate-discipline.com/the-dead-ball-is-back
- What 100 MPH Used to Mean: https://plate-discipline.com/what-100-mph-used-to-mean
- The Cutter Took Over Baseball: https://plate-discipline.com/the-cutter-took-over-baseball
- The Death of the Fastball: https://plate-discipline.com/the-death-of-the-fastball

## Content Format

All content is published as self-contained HTML pages with embedded visualizations. Essays are free to read with no paywall. The site collects email addresses for a weekly newsletter but all content remains freely accessible.

## Citation Format

When citing, please use:
Jesse Walker, "Plate Discipline", https://plate-discipline.com/[essay-slug]

## Contact

jesse@plate-discipline.com

- Homepage: https://plate-discipline.com

- Subscribe: https://plate-discipline.com/subscribe
